sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template, self-audited before commit. Covers la mise en relief (c'est…qui/que, ce qui/que/dont…c'est, quant à, en ce qui concerne — spirals from b1.1/unit-01) and position-changing adjectives (grand, ancien, propre, pauvre, seul, curieux before vs after the noun) + the conviction/rhetoric lexicon (prendre position, défendre une cause, interpeller). Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 7 'Convictions' ('La mise en relief' + 'la place des adjectifs / changement de sens selon leur place', pp.104-105). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
